scripts.build: npm run build -w @tango/core && npm run build -w @tango/voice && npm run build -w @tango/discord && npm run build -w @tango/cli && npm run build -w @tango/atlas-memory
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tango/core && npm run test -w @tango/discord && npm run test -w @tango/voice && npm run test -w @tango/atlas-memory
scripts.build:voice-app: npm run build -w @tango/core && npm run build -w @tango/voice && npm run build -w @tango/tango-voice
scripts.test:voice-app: npm run build -w @tango/core && npm run build -w @tango/voice && npm run test -w @tango/tango-voice
scripts.test:deterministic-research-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-sierra-live-deterministic --suite phase4-research
scripts.test:deterministic-sierra-product-select: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-sierra-live-deterministic --suite phase4-research --case research-product-selection
scripts.test:deterministic-sierra-account-identi: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-sierra-live-deterministic --suite phase4-research --case research-account-identity
scripts.test:deterministic-research-expansion-li: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-sierra-live-deterministic --suite phase4-research-expansion
scripts.test:deterministic-sierra-print-preview-: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-sierra-live-deterministic --suite phase4-research-expansion --case research-print-preview

scripts.test:deterministic-watson-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent watson --session watson-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-watson-live-deterministic --suite phase4-watson
scripts.test:deterministic-watson-expansion-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent watson --session watson-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-watson-live-deterministic --suite phase4-watson-expansion
scripts.test:deterministic-victor-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent victor --session victor-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-victor-live-deterministic --suite phase4-victor
scripts.test:deterministic-watson-finance-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent watson --session watson-live-deterministic --thread-name codex-watson-live-deterministic --transcript "Can you summarize our unconfirmed transactions for me please so we can go through them?" --expect-intent finance.unreviewed_transactions --expect-worker personal-assistant --expect-route executed --expect-write-operations false --expect-step-count 1
scripts.test:deterministic-sierra-write-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-write-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-write-smoke --thread-name codex-sierra-live-write-smoke --suite sierra-file-write
scripts.test:deterministic-phase3-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --suite phase3-mixed-read && node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-write-smoke.ts --suite phase3-mixed
scripts.test:deterministic-malibu-metric-live: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-smoke.ts --agent malibu --thread-name codex-malibu-live-expansion --suite phase4-malibu-expansion --case health-metric-question

scripts.test:deterministic-live-core: npm run test:deterministic-phase1-live && npm run test:deterministic-watson-live && npm run test:deterministic-victor-live && npm run test:deterministic-research-live && npm run test:worker-dispatch-live && npm run test:active-task-continuation-matrix-live
scripts.test:deterministic-sierra-walmart-write-: node --import tsx ./apps/tango-voice/src/testing/live-deterministic-wellness-write-smoke.ts --agent sierra --session sierra-live-write-smoke --thread-name codex-sierra-live-write-smoke --suite sierra-walmart-write

scripts.test:scenarios: npm run build -w @tango/core && npm run build -w @tango/voice && npm run test -w @tango/voice -- test/scenario-runner.test.ts
scripts.verify:profile-refactor: npm run test -w @tango/core -- test/config.test.ts test/config-layering.test.ts test/runtime-paths.test.ts test/prompt-assembly.test.ts && npm run test -w @tango/discord -- test/browser-manager.test.ts test/walmart-cart-processor.test.ts && npm run test -w @tango/tango-voice -- test/shared-storage.test.ts test/route-classifier.test.ts test/voice-projects.test.ts test/channel-router-tango-route.test.ts
